backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the institute's contact number and address are displayed in the Footer component, mapped to test requirement REQ-4.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, brand, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Digital Marketing Town Institute' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the LandingPage as the sole page of the single-page application.
Displays a six-course grid (SEO, SMM, PPC, Content, Email, Analytics) with icons, descriptions, topics, duration, and level, plus an enroll CTA button.
frontend/src/components/CTABanner.tsx: Full-width orange gradient CTA section with a 'Limited Seats Available' badge, enrollment headline, and two buttons that scroll to the contact and FAQ sections.
frontend/src/components/FAQ.tsx: Accordion-style FAQ section with eight questions covering course eligibility, duration, certifications, placement, fees, and support.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Four-column footer displaying the DMTI brand logo, social media links, quick navigation links, course list, and contact info including phone (+91-9717044953) and address (Janakpuri, Delhi).
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component for the DMTI landing page featuring a background image, headline, CTA buttons for enrollment, and stat counters (students, courses, placement rate).
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, smooth-scroll nav links, an 'Enroll Now' CTA button, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials section displaying a 3-column grid of six student review cards with star ratings, quotes, and avatar initials.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Section highlighting six DMTI differentiators (expert instructors, flexible learning, certification, placement, mentorship, live projects) in a responsive card grid.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and login status states.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and Syne fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines dark navy/orange/yellow CSS custom properties for the design system, and adds utility classes for gradients, card hover effects, and glow styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, then mounts it to the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page component that composes all section components (Navbar, Hero, WhyChooseUs, CoursesOverview, Testimonials, CTABanner, FAQ, Footer) into a single full-page layout.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the theme with Inter/Syne fonts, oklch-based CSS variable color tokens, custom border radii, box shadows, and registers the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking schema version, existing implemented features, and pending feature requests for the Digital Marketing Town Institute landing page build.
